titleStmt.title: SII 23.384: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 384. (A.R. No. 384 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Pañchanadēśvara temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: date lost

summary.p: This also begins with the same expressions of the king's exploits. The date portion dvādaśi, Tuesday, Mṛigaśira, is all that can be read. This records a gift made by the mahā-sabhā of Śuttamali-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, an agaram of Pērāvūrnāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, of some pieces of land as tirunāmatukkāṇi and also as ūrkkīḻ-iṟaiyili to the temple of Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiyār built by Piḷḷai Kārāṇai-Viḻupparaiyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ
maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭi
ttalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulo
ttuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu
tuvāteciyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum pe
ṟṟa mirukaciriṣattunāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻavaḷanāṭṭup perāvūrnāṭṭu Akara
m cuttamallic caruppetimaṅkalattu naṭuviṟ
tirumuṟṟattu taṉmiceytu kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟak
kūṭiyirunta peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Iṉnā
ṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ
kuṟṟālattup piḷḷai kārāṇai viḻupparaiyar Eḻunta
ruḷivitta Uṭaiyār tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār
koyil Āticaṇṭecuratevaṟku tirunāmat
tukāṇiyāka viṭṭu Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili
ceytu kuṭutta nilaṉāvatu Ivvūrp piṭā
kai kūṭalūr vatikku kiḻak
ku maturāntakavāykkālukku teṟku Ira
ṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu
kiḻakkaṭaiya capaippotuvāyk kiṭan
ta nilam Aṟukiḻsa 6 1000 Innam perāvūr U
lokamātevivatikku meṟku maturāntaka vā
ykkāl taṟkaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ
catirattu kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam pa Itan ki
ḻakku nilam pa�taciṉnattukku vaṭakkaṭaya
nāṅkaḷ vaṅkippuṟattu caṅkaranārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ
pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiyomāy Eṅkaḷutāyiru
nta nilam � nakīsa3innam mayilpālakulakāla
ni coḻakaṅkavatikku kiḻakku rājātirā
jaṉvāykkālukku ṇṭāṅkaṇṇā
ṟṟu muṉṟāñcatirattu sabhaippotuvāy
kiṭanta nilam m Āka nilam samaṟukī
Iṉnilam Iraṇṭumāviṉkiḻ Iraṇṭumākkāṇi
Araikkāṇikkiḻ mukkālum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka
viṭṭu Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyākac ceytu kuṭutto
m Innilattu menokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻnokkiṉa
kiṇaṟum maṉaiyum m maṟṟum
Eppeṟpaṭṭa paḻanaṭaiyu pākā
ciriyaṅkaḷum Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa
Innilaṅkaḷukku nirpāyum paṇ
ṭāṭu paḻanaṭai pāyavum vāravuṅ kaṭavatākavu
m Ippaṭi cammatittu tirunāmattukkāṇi
yāka viṭṭu Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom ..
Ivuṭaiyār tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭecura
tevaṟku cuttamallic caruppetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi mahaāsa
paiyom paṇiyāl Ivai Ūrkkaṇakku ve
Digital edition of SII 23.384 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
